title: vernonia asteriflora var. mollissima
intro: Vernonia asteriflora var. mollissima, also known as the woolly ironweed, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Vernonia asteriflora var. mollissima include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat wounds, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
